burgers_smooth.description: Burgers smooth: u_t + u·u_x = 0.12·u_xx, u(0,x)=sin(x); reference = data/pde/burgers_smooth.npz

allen_cahn.description: Allen-Cahn: u_t = ε²·u_xx + u - u³ (ε=0.06); IC periodic two-front (narrow→relax); reference = data/pde/allen_cahn.npz

scope_note: P3.7 PDE solver demo (heat + Burgers + Allen-Cahn). Single family (chebyshev_dqc_2d); cross-family on PDEs is P6 territory. Demo output, NOT a paper claim; not in verify_paper_integrity contract.
